query: I'm packaging a skill for a REST/MCP API tool (no local files involved). Which optional repo components does it need — hooks, .mcp.json.example, build.sh?
expected_behavior: Explain the anatomy is core + optional-with-triggers, NOT a fixed shape
Skip hooks/ — that's for skills that edit local files; the hook matcher (Read|Edit|Write|Bash) never sees MCP calls
Include .mcp.json.example (placeholders) — the skill depends on/recommends an MCP
Skip build.sh + dist/ — only for standalone-zip distribution, not marketplace-from-repo
notes: Tests the core+optional decision tree; guards against blindly copying a fixed shape.
